overview: This step creates a template-based report on various counts (word count, character count, etc.) and optionally leveraged data. It acts as a **presentation layer** — most count values are calculated by upstream steps like the Word Count Step, Character Count Step, or Leveraging Step. If those steps are missing from the pipeline, the report will show zeros. Both plain text and HTML report templates are supported.

projectName.help: Displayed in the report title. Corresponds to the `[PROJECT_NAME]` template field.

customTemplateURI.help:
Path or URI to a custom report template file. If left empty or the URI is not found, the **built-in default HTML template** is used.

Templates contain literal text interspersed with report fields enclosed in `[BRACKETS]`. Table rows use double brackets: `[[col1],[col2],...]`.
customTemplateURI.values: A file URI or absolute path to an HTML or plain-text template file.
notes: If both `customTemplateURI` and `customTemplateString` are empty, the default HTML template is used.

dependsOn.condition: customTemplateString takes precedence if both are specified

customTemplateString.help:
Specify the report template content directly as a string instead of referencing an external file. Useful for embedding simple templates without a separate file.

Template syntax: report fields in `[BRACKETS]`, table rows in `[[col1],[col2],...]`.

outputPath.help: Full path where the generated report file will be written. Supports variable substitution for dynamic paths.
outputPath.values: Supports `${rootDir}` (pipeline root directory) and locale variables: `${srcLoc}`, `${trgLoc}`, etc.

countAsNonTranslatable_GMXProtected.help: Words/characters marked as 'protected' (e.g. XLIFF `<mrk mtype="protected">` elements) are excluded from the translatable count. These are text segments explicitly marked as not requiring translation.

countAsNonTranslatable_GMXExactMatched.help: Words/characters from text units matched **unambiguously** with a prior translation (requiring no translator input) are excluded from the translatable count. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_GMXLeveragedMatch.help: Words/characters from text units matched against a **leveraged translation memory** database are excluded from the translatable count. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_GMXRepetitionMatc.help: Words/characters from **repeating text units** not matched in any other form are excluded from the translatable count. Repetition matching takes precedence over fuzzy matching. Typically populated by the **Repetition Analysis Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_GMXFuzzyMatch.help: Words/characters from text units **fuzzy-matched** against a leveraged translation memory are excluded from the translatable count. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_GMXAlphanumericOn.help: Words/characters from text units containing **only alphanumeric words** (no natural language) are excluded from the translatable count.

countAsNonTranslatable_GMXNumericOnlyTex.help: Words/characters from text units containing **only numeric words** are excluded from the translatable count.

countAsNonTranslatable_GMXMeasurementOnl.help: Words/characters from **measurement-only** text units are excluded from the translatable count.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactUniqueIdMatc.help: Words from segments that match **exactly** and also match a **unique ID** are excluded from the translatable count. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactPreviousVers.help: Words from segments that match exactly and come from the **preceding version** of the same document. Strictly the immediately prior version (e.g. v3 for v4, not v2 or v1). Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactLocalContext.help: Words from segments that match exactly and also match a **small number of surrounding segments** (local context). Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactDocumentCont.help: Words from segments that match exactly and come from the **same document**. Typically populated by the **Repetition Analysis Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactStructuralMa.help: Words from segments that match exactly and share the same **structural type** (title, paragraph, list element, etc.). Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactMatch.help: Words from segments that match **text and codes exactly** (100% match). Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactTextOnlyPrev.help: Words from segments where **text matches exactly** but codes differ, and the match comes from a **previous version** of the same document. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactTextOnlyUniq.help: Words from segments where **text matches exactly** but codes differ, and the match also has a **unique ID** match. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactTextOnly.help: Words from segments where **text matches exactly** but there is a difference in one or more inline codes. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_ExactRepaired.help: Words from segments that match exactly only **after automated repair** (number replacement, code repair, capitalization, punctuation changes). Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_FuzzyPreviousVers.help: Words from **fuzzy-matched** segments that come from a **previous version** of the same document. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_FuzzyUniqueIdMatc.help: Words from **fuzzy-matched** segments that also match a **unique ID**. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_FuzzyMatch.help: Words from segments that **partially match** text and/or codes (fuzzy match). Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_FuzzyRepaired.help: Words from **fuzzy-matched** segments where automated repair (number replacement, code repair, etc.) was applied to the target. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_PhraseAssembled.help: Words from translations **assembled from phrases** in the TM or other resources using various algorithms.

countAsNonTranslatable_MT.help: Words from translations produced by a **machine translation engine**. Typically populated by the **Leveraging Step**.

countAsNonTranslatable_Concordance.help: Words from **TM concordance or phrase matches** (usually individual words or terms only).

processingNotes: This step is a **presentation layer** only — it does not calculate counts itself. Word counts come from the **Word Count Step**, character counts from the **Character Count Step**, and leverage data from the **Leveraging Step** or **Repetition Analysis Step**. Missing upstream steps result in zeros in the report.

The `countAsNonTranslatable_*` flags control which match categories are subtracted from the total to compute the **translatable word count**. The non-translatable count is the sum of all enabled categories; the translatable count is `total - non-translatable`.
Character count equivalents exist for all word-count report fields — replace `WORD` with `CHARACTER` or append `_CHARACTER` to the field name. Character counts **exclude** whitespace and punctuation.
The `PROJECT_NOCATEGORY` / `ITEM_NOCATEGORY` fields are computed by subtracting the sum of all categorized words from the total word count.

examples.title: Custom CSV template
examples.description: A plain-text template producing a CSV-style scoping report with leveraging breakdown per file. Row syntax `[[...]]` repeats for each input document.
examples.config:
```yaml
projectName: Community website
customTemplateString: |
  Project Name: [PROJECT_NAME]
  Creation Date: [PROJECT_DATE]
  Target Locale: [PROJECT_TARGET_LOCALE]

  File,Exact Previous Version,Exact Local Context,100% Matches,Fuzzy,Repetitions,Total
  [[ITEM_NAME],[ITEM_EXACT_PREVIOUS_VERSION],[ITEM_EXACT_LOCAL_CONTEXT],[ITEM_EXACT],[ITEM_FUZZY],[ITEM_GMX_REPETITION_MATCHED_WORD_COUNT],[ITEM_TOTAL_WORD_COUNT],]
  Total,[PROJECT_EXACT_PREVIOUS_VERSION],[PROJECT_EXACT_LOCAL_CONTEXT],[PROJECT_EXACT],[PROJECT_FUZZY],[PROJECT_GMX_REPETITION_MATCHED_WORD_COUNT],[PROJECT_TOTAL_WORD_COUNT]
outputPath: ${rootDir}/scoping_report.csv
```
examples.output:
```
Project Name: Community website
Creation Date: 17.03.2011 23:21:23 CET
Target Locale: fr-ca

File,Exact Previous Version,Exact Local Context,100% Matches,Fuzzy,Repetitions,Total
aa324.html,10,23,12,57,132,23,
form.html,31,22,13,17,19,17,
Total,210,323,512,357,312,154
```
